title: TriageCore Workspace Today Focus List
description: Schema for the daily focus list used by the tc workspace now command.

date.description: Optional ISO 8601 date string for when this focus list was created or intended.

focus.description: List of work item IDs to focus on today.

max_active_items.description: Maximum number of focus items before a warning is issued.

max_high_risk_items.description: Maximum number of high risk focus items before a warning is issued.

notes.description: General notes, intentions, or reminders for the day.
